title: Hidden Gems
description: Just a simple texture pack that makes the ores blend in with the stone a bit to well. ;)
body:
A very simple to understand resource pack. It retextures all the ores to blend in with the rest of the environment. For example, normal diamond ore has now been retextured to stone. Simple as that.

Before
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c601632773df929eaef02b83de700fd01b9951f9.png)
After
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71701e4700c0152554877d1cbde5c63de1c6bdaa.png)

<details>
<summary>Ores Retextured</summary>
-   All Deepslate ores 
-   All normal ores 
-   All nether ores

</details>
